_comment: Synergy layer. 'pairs' are strong specific combos (enabler pairings / cooldown coverage), treated as symmetric - listing a->b also counts for b->a. Scale 0..3. 'archetype_coherence' rewards a candidate whose archetype matches the dominant archetype of your locked teammates, so the tool prefers picks that fit the comp instead of five disconnected counters.

pairs.note: classic pocket - mobile air bully + dmg boost/rez
ana sustains + nano boosts the rein engage
suzu cleanse keeps the brawl tank alive
bubble into blizzard combo / brawl pressure
